name: secret-palace-simulator
description: SecretPalace Node.js data simulator for API v1 testing

scripts.dev: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run
scripts.start: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run
scripts.hyper: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --config config/hyper.json --no-interactive
scripts.dry-run: npm run build && node dist/cli.js run --dry-run
scripts.replay: npm run build && node dist/cli.js replay
